title: Information Technology Minor Dissertation

prerequisites.text: CSC5005H and CSC5006H, or (CSC5007Z/CSC5013Z, CSC5010Z, CSC5011Z, CSC5012Z, CSC5014Z/INF5007Z, CSC5015Z/INF5009Z, CSC5016Z/INF5008Z and CSC5017Z), or permission from the convener.

outline: Upon successful completion of the coursework component, students will be required to register for this minor dissertation course and complete a one-year research project under supervision of an appropriate computer science academic staff member.
assessment: The minor dissertation must be presented for formal examination. The coursework and minor dissertation each count 50% towards the degree; each must be passed separately for the award of the degree.
